overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban environment at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic vehicles, and characters in a high-fidelity game engine setting. The camera moves from a parked six-wheel car past a sitting character on stairs to a futuristic motorcycle, showcasing detailed cyberpunk architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered vehicle bay with neon ceiling

events.description: character enters the six-wheel vehicle and closes the door

agents.ego_description: circling around the parked vehicle to observe the character and surroundings

notable_agents.action: futuristic six-wheel car parked with trunk open, then closed as character enters
character in white pants and dark jacket entering the vehicle

entered.detail: thick yellow support column with warning signage and peeling paint
grid of yellow fluorescent light panels covering the ceiling
green painted industrial wall with ventilation grates and utility boxes
row of red and white automated vending machines against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered cyberpunk vehicle bay with a yellow ceiling grid casting warm light. A futuristic six-wheel car sits center frame with its trunk open, while a character in white pants stands nearby before entering the vehicle and closing the door. The camera circles the vehicle, revealing green industrial walls and red vending machines in the background.

events.description: moving from the vehicle bay toward the concrete stairway
camera passes closely by the sitting character on the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking past the parked car and approaching the stairway with the sitting character

notable_agents.action: character with green skin and red patterned bodysuit sitting on stairs looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with red-brown stained steps leading upward
illuminated arcade-style vending machines with colorful digital displays
tall building wall with pink and purple neon lighting accents
stacked white plastic crates and containers beside the stairs

segments.scene_description: Moving from the vehicle bay, the scene transitions to a stairway landing where a character with green skin sits on concrete steps. The camera passes illuminated arcade vending machines and pink neon-lit building facades. White storage containers line the right side as the ceiling grid continues overhead, and the green industrial wall shifts to the left background.

events.description: entering the open street corridor with tall buildings on both sides
slowing down to focus on the parked motorcycle details

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow street toward the parked motorcycle, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in white shirt and dark pants with blue hair walking toward the camera
futuristic black motorcycle with glowing green neon wheel accents parked by the vending booth

entered.detail: green and purple food vending kiosk with illuminated menu displays
vertical neon signs and billboards on distant buildings
high-rise buildings with lit windows towering over the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a narrow cyberpunk street corridor flanked by tall residential towers with neon signage. The camera passes a character walking in the opposite direction and approaches a futuristic black motorcycle with glowing green wheel accents parked beside a food vending booth. The pink building facade remains visible on the right while the ceiling grid continues overhead, creating an enclosed urban canyon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered vehicle bay into a narrow, neon-lit cyberpunk street corridor. It begins beneath a yellow ceiling grid where a character enters a futuristic six-wheel car, with the camera circling the vehicle to reveal green industrial walls and red vending machines. As the camera moves forward, the bay transitions into a stairway landing where a green-skinned character sits on concrete steps amidst pink neon facades and illuminated arcade machines. The scene then opens into an enclosed urban canyon flanked by tall residential towers and neon signage, passing a pedestrian in the opposite direction. Finally, the movement leads toward a black futuristic motorcycle with glowing green wheels parked beside a food vending booth under the persisting overhead grid.
